prose: The Fukui-reactivity analysis on pyridine was performed using chemkit with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The most electrophilic atom is the nitrogen (atom 1), and the most nucleophilic is the carbon at position 4 (atom 4). The zero-order Fukui value is approximately 0.2742, indicating potential reactive sites. Warnings include charge drift issues in the open-shell states, but results are trustworthy.
